news.title: Musk Says He ‘Was a Fool’ to Provide OpenAI’s Early Funding
news.snippet: In the second day of a trial pitting Mr. Musk against OpenAI, he said the company’s chief executive, Sam Altman, had misled him. But OpenAI’s lawyer said evidence showed the opposite.

news.title: In Backlash Against Tech in Schools, Parents Are Winning Rollbacks
news.snippet: From Salt Lake City to New York City, parents are demanding more sway over the digital tools that schools give children.

news.title: Ford Reports Higher Profit Thanks Partly to Tariff Refund
news.snippet: Ford Motor said it expected the federal government to refund $1.3 billion the company paid in tariffs that the Supreme Court later struck down.

news.title: Even without OpenAI, Elon Musk has made A.I. a big part of his business empire.
A.I. Helps Online Ad Businesses Boom
news.snippet: Google and Meta are enjoying a digital ad boom, as artificial intelligence automates marketing and drives record sales.

news.title: OpenAI Trial Starts With Two Very Different Tales of a Company’s Early Years
news.snippet: In the trial’s first day of testimony, Elon Musk said greed led co-founder Sam Altman to pull the A.I. lab away from its nonprofit roots. OpenAI says that’s nonsense.

news.title: Here’s what OpenAI’s lawyer argued in his opening statement.
Supreme Court Appears Skeptical of Falun Gong Lawsuit Against Cisco
news.snippet: The court’s decision could have broader implications for lawsuits seeking to hold companies liable for international human rights abuses.

news.title: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
news.snippet: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.

news.title: Why friendly AI chatbots might be less trustworthy
news.snippet: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".

news.title: Musk accuses Altman of stealing a charity as courtroom battle begins
news.snippet: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.

news.title: Why Sam Altman and his former hero Elon Musk are taking their toxic feud to court
news.snippet: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.

news.title: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
news.snippet: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?

news.title: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
news.snippet: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.

news.title: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
news.snippet: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.

news.title: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
news.snippet: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.

news.title: Biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
news.snippet: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.

news.title: Taylor Swift Wants to Trademark Her Likeness. These TikTok Deepfake Ads Show Why
news.snippet: Researchers show scammers are using AI-manipulated footage of celebrity interviews to trick users into sharing their personal data.

news.title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
news.snippet: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.

news.title: How Trump Weaponized the DOJ Division That Kept Elections Fair
news.snippet: The Trump administration has effectively forced out more than two dozen experienced lawyers from the DOJ's Voting Section, the part of the agency responsible for upholding the Voting Rights Act.

news.title: Smart Cat Collars: Which Is Best for Health and GPS Tracking?
news.snippet: I pitted Tractive and Fi Mini smart cat collars against each other to crown the best for activity, sleep, and GPS tracking.

news.title: Adidas Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3 Shoe Review: World Record Breaker
news.snippet: I ran in Sabastian Sawe’s world-record-breaking running shoe. It’s fast, but only if you can maintain your locked-in form for 26 miles.

news.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
news.snippet: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

news.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
news.snippet: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

news.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
news.snippet: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

news.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
news.snippet: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

news.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
news.snippet: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.

news.title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
news.snippet: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.

news.title: Google Cloud surpasses $20B, but says growth was capacity-constrained
news.snippet: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.

news.title: Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
news.snippet: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.

news.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
news.snippet: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

news.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
news.snippet: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

news.title: 第20届中国投资年会圆满闭幕！ “K型曲线”下，寻找穿越分化的确定性
news.snippet:
2026年4月22日至24日，第20届中国投资年会·年度峰会于北京海淀盛大召开。本届大会以“K型曲线”为主题，由北京市海淀区人民政府指导，投中信息、投中网主办，北京中关村科学城创新发展有限公司协办。本届年会连续第二年扎根北京海淀，双方合作正从初次携手走向深度融合。超千名行业领袖、投资人及创业者齐聚海淀，共同研判中国私募股权市场的结构性变局。

news.title: 推理卡毛利率下滑超7%，天数智芯「降价换量」的买卖值不值？
news.snippet: 2个多月前在港股上市的天数智芯，近期发布了2025年财报。公布当天，股价下跌了10个点。在此之前，天数股价已从342港元的高位大幅回调。财报显示，天数全年营收10.34亿元，同比增长91.6%。一级市场投资人林云直言，这个表现没有达到大家的心理预期。对比其他几家国产公司这两年来的增长速度，市场给天数的营收底线预期是：12亿元。但另一方面，分析师Ethan透露，资本

news.title: 明日新程完成连续两轮融资，领跑Harness群体多智能体赛道
